prediction_outcome: Scenario A CONFIRMED — general cascading established. All quantitative predictions matched.
key_finding: Early-position cascading is GENERAL on Llama (not H5-specific). Position-dependence scales perfectly with criticality: r=-0.991 (p=0.009). 4-head spectrum: H5=50.8pp, H3=49.1pp, H1=34.5pp, H7=15.3pp. Cascading is architectural (analog encoding), not circuit-specific.
evidence_impact: Added findings #62-64. Updated narrative synthesis. Established that head x position coupling on analog models is a general multiplicative interaction, not answer-head-specific.
next_planned: Test cascading generality on Qwen (do other Qwen heads also show position-independence?), or comprehensive final synthesis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama. Head x position ENCODING-DEPENDENT.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent. CASCADING IS GENERAL on Llama: all 4 heads show early>late gradient, r=-0.991.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute. TRIPLE-CONFIRMED.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama. Head x position: orthogonal on Qwen, multiplicative scaling on Llama (r=-0.991). 4-head cascading spectrum established.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 variants. Head x position on 2 models. Encoding-dependent cascading established.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + explains cascading: digital=orthogonal (error-correcting codewords), analog=coupled (continuous routing cascades). r=-0.991 criticality scaling.
